segment.source: The standard pricing section: plan cards in a selectable two-, three-, or four-column grid, each with name, price, billing period, rich-text description, check-mark feature list, and button; one plan can carry a featured badge. Use it for: price lists, subscription tiers, service packages, and membership plans. Default choice for plan pricing; use 'Single-Price Card' for one plan, 'Plan Comparison Matrix' for feature-by-feature tables, 'Annual vs Monthly Pricing' when two billing prices appear.
